concerns.text: Task T016d (Synthetic Validation Loop) is listed BEFORE T015 (Permutation Engine implementation). T016d explicitly calls T015 ('run the synthetic validation (T016 + T015)'). A consumer task cannot precede its producer. T015 must be moved before T016d.
Task T016 (Synthetic dataset generator) is listed AFTER T016d and T016b/c. T016d and T016b/c depend on the generator implemented in T016. T016 must precede T016d, T016b, and T016c.
Task T024 (Threshold sweep logic) depends on T024b (N enforcement logic) which is listed AFTER it. T024 description states 'This task depends on T024b'. T024b must precede T024.

Task T007b (Constitutional Gate Check) is listed AFTER T007 (Stats Engine skeleton) but BEFORE T008 (BY Correction). While T007b gates T008, T007b itself depends on the existence of `code/main.py` or `code/constitution.py` which are not explicitly created in a prior task (T001 creates dirs, T002 requirements). T007b should be grouped with T007 or T001 to ensure the file exists before the check is implemented.
Tasks T016b and T016c are listed after T016d. T016d calls them. They should be listed before T016d to reflect the dependency flow (Implementation -> Loop).
